texto: She was like some kind of Energizer Bunny nonstop bitch machine...She needed three more husbands, so we could all take shifts listening to her.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Victor Gischler: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “She was like some kind of Energizer Bunny nonstop bitch machine...She needed three more husbands,…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, listening, energizer pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.

texto: Mortimer had maxed three credit cards stocking the cave with canned goods and medical supplies and tools and everything a man needed to live through the end of the world. There were more than a thousand books along shelves in the driest part of the cave. There used to be several boxes of pornography until Mortimer realized that he'd spent nearly ten days in a row sitting in the cave masturbating. He burned the dirty magazines to keep from doing some terrible whacking injury to himself.
explicacao: Citação de Victor Gischler sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Mortimer had maxed three credit cards stocking the cave with canned goods and medical supplies an…” articula humor, apocalyptic, funny em registro de humor, com relevância para contextos como termino e funny.
